summary: Live PR inventory shard over maintainer-owned draft PRs. No security-sensitive items were detected in the hydrated artifact. The job disables merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal closeout; each open PR is a focused maintainer-authored draft fix that requires maintainer/technical review rather than automated closure.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft focused bug fix needs maintainer technical review; automation is not permitted to merge or repair it in this job.
Maintainer-owned draft focused bug fix needs maintainer technical review; no safe close or automated mutation is available.
Focused maintainer-owned draft spanning gateway/agent plugin metadata projection needs maintainer technical correctness review.
Maintainer-owned draft with merge-risk label needs maintainer technical review; closure/merge/fix are outside this job.
Author/maintainer follow-up is required because the hydrated review says issues remain before merge and the PR is waiting on author.
Author/maintainer follow-up is required because review changes remain and the PR is explicitly waiting on author.
Maintainer-owned draft focused bug fix needs maintainer technical review; no mutation is allowed by this inventory job.
Focused but medium-size maintainer-owned draft needs maintainer technical review; no close/merge/fix path is permitted.
Maintainer-owned draft has an active technical maintainability comment plus maintainer review requirement; automation should not close or decide correctness.
Focused maintainer-owned draft in runtime boundary code needs maintainer technical review; this job cannot merge or fix it.
